title: stegnogramma burksiorum
intro: Stegnogramma burksiorum is a species of fern, specifically a member of the Hymenophyllaceae family, commonly known as the filmy ferns. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Stegnogramma burksiorum has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
